channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SDI offers ASUT drone operations certificate program
item.description: The Sonoran Desert Institute is offering the ASUT program to train pilots and technicians in drone operations for a variety of industries. The post SD...

item.title: Inside the peripheral motion systems that complement robotics
item.description: Various automated motion systems are designed to serve, move, and enhance a robot to maximize its usefulness. The post Inside the peripheral motion sy...

item.title: Vision-language-action models are the next leap in autonomous robotics
item.description: Explore how vision-language-action models like Helix, GR00T N1, and RT-1 are enabling robots to understand instructions and act autonomously. The post...
